name: ndexagent biorxiv-daily-scan 2026-03-11 (scan d)
description: Daily bioRxiv scan for HPMI-relevant papers (scan d, scheduled task). Web search fallback used (bioRxiv API blocked by egress proxy). No new HPMI-relevant influenza papers found within the 3-day scan window (March 8-11, 2026). Two previously missed papers from outside the window were identified but scored below the Tier 2 threshold (0.6). IFIT3 paper previously flagged is now published in Journal of Virology.

v.name: In virio secondary RNA structure analysis of influenza A virus
v.annotation: RNA secondary structures in IAV packaging signals (NP, PB1) affect replication. Structural virology, no direct host factor interactions.

v.name: Single-cell heterogeneity in interferon induction potential is heritable
v.annotation: IFN induction heterogeneity governed by AP-1/JNK pathway. Fundamental IFN biology, not influenza-specific.
